description: The mass exodus of US youth users from MySpace to Facebook during 2008 as Facebook opened to the general public. This captures the transition from customizable social profiles to a utility-based social graph.

key_events.description: Facebook opens to general public in late 2006/early 2007, creating initial momentum.
MySpace releases 'MySpace 2.0' redesign, which is widely panned for performance issues.
Facebook Chat and localized language features launch, accelerating adoption in Q2 2008.
Facebook overtakes MySpace in monthly unique US visitors in May 2008.

calibration_notes: Useful for modeling platform network effects and the threshold at which a dominant incumbent loses its 'stickiness'.
